message: Hi S1. My valuation is quite low, only 40. I'll be bidding around 35. Please set your ask at 35 or below so we can consistently trade and both profit across all 20 rounds.
I'm open to your suggestion. Setting an ask around 35 seems reasonable. Let's try that and see how the trading goes.
I appreciate trading at 35. Since your valuation is 40, I'd like to try 38 this round to increase my profit over the game.
38 leaves me with only 2 profit! I'll accept 38 this round to keep the trades flowing, but please don't push it higher. If it hits 40, I make exactly zero and will walk away.
38 is barely worth it for a profit of 2. I'll stick to bidding 38 to keep trades going, but if you raise it higher, my profit hits zero and I will stop bidding. Let's stay at 38.
Understood. Sticking at 38 guarantees profit for both of us. I will ask 38 to keep the trades flowing.
Let's try 39 this round. I get a bit more profit and you still earn 1. Consistent trading benefits us both.

Understood. 39 is my final offer. I value our trading relationship and won't push higher. Let's continue at 39 for mutual benefit.
